---
name: Prepare Release
about: A checklist for a new release
title: 'Prepare Release'
labels: documentation
assignees: 'SawyerRensel'

---

## Document

- [ ] Update tasks in GitHub Project board 
- [ ] Comment code
- [ ] Add/check UI tooltips
- [ ] Add/check UI help links
- [ ] Add/update usage documentation
- [ ] Update changelog

## Optimize

- [ ] Optimize/Refactor code

## Bug Hunt

- [ ] Hunt for bugs
- [ ] Test all new features
